authors: Gregory P. Perreault Jacob L. Nelson a University of South Floridab University of Utah
raw_title: Aspirational Metajournalism: What Nieman Journalism Lab Predictions Reveal About Platform and Audience Imaginaries
title_en: Aspirational Metajournalism: What Nieman Journalism Lab Predictions Reveal About Platform and Audience Imaginaries
title_zh: 抱负性元新闻学：尼曼新闻实验室预测揭示的平台与受众想象
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究分析了尼曼新闻实验室的预测内容，探讨新闻行业如何想象未来的平台和受众。研究发现这些预测反映了新闻从业者对技术发展和读者行为的期望与担忧。
plain_summary_en: This study analyzes predictions from Nieman Journalism Lab to explore how the journalism industry imagines future platforms and audiences. The research finds these predictions reflect journalists' hopes and concerns about technological developments and reader behavior.
research_direction_zh: 探索新闻行业对未来发展的集体想象，特别是关于技术平台和受众关系的预测性论述如何塑造新闻实践和行业愿景。
research_direction_en: Examining the collective imagination of the journalism industry about future developments, particularly how predictive discourses about technology platforms and audience relationships shape journalistic practices and industry visions.
